audienceSegments.label: Local Balinese / Indonesian clients
audienceSegments.description: Residents seeking licensed aesthetic and weight-management care in Bali with Bahasa/English support.

audienceSegments.label: International medical tourists
audienceSegments.description: Travelers comparing licensed clinics, consultation steps, and safe treatment planning before visiting Bali.

serviceCategories.label: Wegovy / semaglutide weight management
serviceCategories.description: Licensed clinic-led weight-management program context. Educational positioning only; individual suitability requires medical assessment.
contentClusters: pricing and program structure (no outcome promises)
complianceNotes: Do not imply Wegovy or semaglutide is suitable for everyone; emphasize prescriber assessment.
Avoid guaranteed weight-loss percentages or timelines.
No off-label promotion; reference licensed prescriber oversight only.

serviceCategories.label: Stem cell therapy
serviceCategories.description: Consultative stem cell therapy information for a licensed aesthetic clinic. Educational scope only; outcomes vary by patient and protocol.
contentClusters: licensed clinic protocols and candidacy screening
medical tourism planning for stem cell consults
complianceNotes: Never state or imply stem cell therapy cures, reverses, or permanently fixes any condition.
Use consultative language; defer outcomes to individualized medical evaluation.
Require licensed provider and facility credentials in high-intent pages.

serviceCategories.label: General aesthetic services
serviceCategories.description: Non-surgical and aesthetic treatment categories positioned with realistic expectations and licensed practitioner delivery.
complianceNotes: Before/after content must include consent and realistic-expectation disclaimers.
Avoid permanent-result or guaranteed-beauty outcome language.
Attribute treatments to licensed practitioners and approved devices/products.

serviceCategories.label: Bali medical tourism / international client journey
serviceCategories.description: International client journey content covering consultation, travel planning, clinic coordination, and follow-up—without overstating medical outcomes.
contentClusters: travel and stay planning for Bali treatments
post-visit follow-up and continuity of care
complianceNotes: Position Puriva as a licensed Bali clinic partner—not a generic tourism promise.
Do not bundle travel marketing with unverified medical outcome claims.
Highlight consultation-first steps and documentation requirements for international clients.
